arts.ttl: 5 talking points as Wales start World Cup qualifying campaign against Kazakhstan
arts.sum: Belgium, Liechtenstein and North Macedonia complete the Group J picture.

arts.ttl: Quiz: How well do you know Bellamy's career?
arts.sum: A Welsh football icon who played for Liverpool, Manchester City and Newcastle United, Craig Bellamy is now an unbeaten Wales coach - test your knowledge of this colourful football character.
